/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fluid_synth.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,fluid_synth.so -o fluid_synth.so CMakeFiles/fluid_synth.dir/fluidsynthgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fluid_synth.dir/fluidsynti.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fluid_synth.dir/moc_fluidsynthgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fluid_synth.dir/moc_fluidsynti.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fluid_synth.dir/qrc_fluidsynth.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules ../libsynti/libmuse_synti.so /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a /usr/lib/libQt5Xml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.19 -lfluidsynth -linstpatch-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lgthread-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lsndfile ../../libs/mpevent/libmuse_mpevent_module.so /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19 ../../libs/evdata/libmuse_evdata_module.so ../../libs/memory/libmuse_memory_module.so ../../libs/sysex_helper/libmuse_sysex_helper_module.so
